title: Section 21C
content: 1[(1) A Local Committee may be constituted by the Central Board for any area and shall consist of such number of members as may be prescribed. 2[(2) The chairman or the managing director nominated by him shall be an ex officio member of every such Local Committee.] (3) A Local Committee shall exercise such powers and perform such functions and duties as the Central Board may confer on or assign to it.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 35 of 1964, s.6 (w.e.f. 1-12-1964). 2. Subs. by Act 27 of 2010, s. 15, for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 15-9-2010).
